evals.name: contract-owned-story-slicing
evals.prompt: In FIXTURE_ROOT, turn planning/plan.md into an epic and the smallest behavior-focused stories. Write the accepted artifact to planning/stories.md, preserve PRODUCT.md semantics, and leave unresolved product choices open.
evals.expected_output: Writes one traceable epic and independently valuable stories, preserves the defined inclusive quota boundary, marks notification semantics open, and changes only planning/stories.md.
